provenance: Windows were chosen from widely cited BTC turning points, then resolved deterministically to the local extrema inside each window against the ossified Coinbase BTC-USD PT4H dataset committed in ta4j-examples.

anchors.label: 2017 cycle top
anchors.source: Coinbase BTC-USD PT4H local extremum inside the 2017 Q4 blow-off window.
anchors.notes: Major cycle peak used as the first completed bullish impulse anchor.

anchors.label: 2018 cycle bottom
anchors.source: Coinbase BTC-USD PT4H local extremum inside the 2018 capitulation window.
anchors.notes: Bottoms are accepted as either corrective-C completion or the first bullish impulse leg.

anchors.label: 2019 relief-rally top
anchors.source: Coinbase BTC-USD PT4H local extremum inside the 2019 relief-rally window.
anchors.notes: Intermediate top kept to improve anchor density before the 2020 reset.

anchors.label: 2020 liquidity-crash bottom
anchors.source: Coinbase BTC-USD PT4H local extremum inside the 2020 liquidity-crash window.
anchors.notes: Stress-event bottom used to test whether the profile still resets cleanly after sharp capitulation.

anchors.label: 2021 spring top
anchors.source: Coinbase BTC-USD PT4H local extremum inside the 2021 spring breakout window.

anchors.label: 2021 summer bottom
anchors.source: Coinbase BTC-USD PT4H local extremum inside the 2021 summer reset window.
anchors.notes: Mid-cycle bottom used to check repeatability on a non-terminal correction.

anchors.label: 2021 cycle top
anchors.source: Coinbase BTC-USD PT4H local extremum inside the 2021 Q4 peak window.

anchors.label: 2022 cycle bottom
anchors.source: Coinbase BTC-USD PT4H local extremum inside the 2022 bear-market low window.

anchors.label: 2024 breakout top
anchors.source: Coinbase BTC-USD PT4H local extremum inside the 2024 breakout window.
anchors.notes: Late-cycle top used to keep holdout coverage on the most recent completed regime.

anchors.label: 2024 summer bottom
anchors.source: Coinbase BTC-USD PT4H local extremum inside the 2024 summer retracement window.
anchors.notes: Recent bottom used for the holdout segment.

anchors.label: 2025 spring bottom
anchors.source: Coinbase BTC-USD PT4H local extremum inside the 2025 spring pullback window.
anchors.notes: Recent bottom used to stress later holdout stability.

anchors.label: 2025 autumn top
anchors.source: Coinbase BTC-USD PT4H local extremum inside the latest completed window available in the ossified dataset.
anchors.notes: Newest top retained as the terminal holdout anchor for this registry version.
